SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CONZELMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YELP, INC IS PRESENT.
